core_finding: Replay-derived intent can be integrated as an upstream structured intent source without modifying PPP.

intent_source_equivalence.human_intent: eligible after cognition structures the prompt
intent_source_equivalence.replay_derived_intent: eligible after gap detection creates hash-bound structured intent

ppp_preservation_assessment.assessment: PPP remains preserved as Intent -> Proposal -> Validation -> Approval -> Handoff.

domain_applicability.trading: non-executing evidence and validation improvements only; no broker, exchange, order, live trading, or portfolio mutation authority
domain_applicability.marketing: analysis and review improvements only; no campaign activation authority
domain_applicability.healthcare: high-risk review-only improvements with explicit human approval
domain_applicability.hr: privacy-preserving review-only improvements with human oversight
domain_applicability.aigol_core: constitution-preserving review-only improvements unless separately human-governed
